productDisplayName: Playboy Women Play It Rock Perfume
description: Play It Rock perfume for women from playboy is an exciting feminine fragrance in a delectable bottle with the bunny ear shaped top with a bow. Opening notes are red orange, candied apple and saffron aromas with a heart of passionflower, orange blossom and frangipani, while a base has ebony, patchouli and tonka beans.Quantity: 75 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
